title: A Developmental Taxonomy of Autism and the Precision Timing of the Cheung Glutamatergic Regimen.
abstract: Review proposing two mechanistically distinct autism subtypes: early-diagnosed (Failure to Build, mitochondrial/ribosomal) and late-diagnosed (Failure to Refine, astrocyte dysfunction, complement pruning, LRRK2). Proposes glutamatergic drug regimen for post-pubertal late-diagnosed subtype.
